adjustment_guardrails.perishable_pack_boundary: Fresh and short-fresh rows may flex to fit an already chosen pack, but an upward adjustment must not open another pack.
adjustment_guardrails.round_amount_policy: For g/ml perishables, final adjusted recipe amounts prefer clean 25g/25ml style steps unless the saved line interval is larger.
adjustment_guardrails.non_perishable_policy: Pantry, freezer, ambient, spice, seasoning, oil and sauce rows are not adjustment candidates.
adjustment_guardrails.filling_breach_policy: Small recalculated macro and fullness movement is allowed for local pack-fit overlays; calculator blockers still block.
